PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF, KATHLEEN CHADWELL. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
